title: Email Automations Don't Duplicate When the Board Duplicates
excerpt:
I’m trying to duplicate templated Monday boards I have created with automations built in but when I duplicate the boards, the automations that notify people via email do not transfer over. 
Also, it won’t let me create a…

posts.author: tanner.palm (Tanner Palm)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to duplicate templated Monday boards I have created with automations built in but when I duplicate the boards, the automations that notify people via email do not transfer over.

Also, it won’t let me create an automation template (it errors out) to use on duplicated boards.

Does anyone know why these automations don’t duplicate with the board?

posts.author: Jeanette (Jeanette)
posts.cookedHtml: I am running into same issue. I have a templated board for project managers and am now having to rebuild 10 automations on each PM’s board to ensure it works correctly.

posts.author: LouMc (Louise McKay)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have had the same problem for all templates since we started using Monday.com about 18 months ago. The same applies to any custom automations including notify by slack .
…I just came here looking to see if there were any recent updates…

Support, it would be great if there was a fix for this - one of the main reasons to make a “template” is that custom automations with emails or slack notifications are fiddly to reproduce (and hard to remember which ones you’ve copied over and which ones you haven’t yet). Please help us!

posts.author: Maryam (Maryam )
posts.cookedHtml: This is a huge issue on our side too!

posts.author: AprelD (Aprel Dobson)
posts.cookedHtml: I am having the same issue. We use a template board to manage a shared project board for each of our clients. Rewriting the all the automations 200 times is incredibly tedious.

posts.author: daytonabradley (Daytona B)
posts.cookedHtml: Same issue here, was hoping for a reply on this thread from Monday.com

posts.author: ByronGriffin (ByronGriffin)
posts.cookedHtml: The problem is likely due to the fact that when duplicating the automation boards, they are not automatically copied. You will have to set them up again on each duplicated board. However, if you are having trouble creating an automation template, it may be due to a bug in the system.

posts.author: Portraits (Amanda Fauver)
posts.cookedHtml: We are a photography studio. We have created boards by school year to track orders, sessions, etc. We currently use integration with Outlook and are considering adding integration with Twilio for SMS messaging when orders are complete or ready to be picked up. We need these integrated automations automatically duplicate when boards are duplicated to ensure less human-error mistakes.

posts.author: Portraits (Amanda Fauver)
posts.cookedHtml:
Also - this discussion topic has be entered as a Feature Request - we all need to go vote on it so Monday.com can see all the interest in this added feature!
Duplicate complex automations with integration blocks to new project boards (eg. Outlook automations)

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! Thanks for highlighting this! I encourage everyone to vote for it in our feature request category. Your voted have an impact when our product team is thinking about the features to work on next. More about the process here. All you need to know about our new Feature Request process
